hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(commit|push).*\b(master|history/rewrite)\b" && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(push.*origin.*feature/|push.*--delete)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not commit or push directly to master or history/rewrite. Use a feature branch (feature/<category>/<description>) and squash-merge via PR."; exit 1; fi'
hooks.description: Block direct commits/pushes to master and history/rewrite

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push.*--force"; then echo "BLOCKED: Force push is not allowed. Use a feature branch and squash-merge via PR."; exit 1; fi'
